name: Grantor Trust Income and Deduction Flow-through

eligibility.description: Taxpayers who establish trusts where they retain certain powers or interests (Grantor Trusts) allowing for tax-efficient planning and use of trust-level losses or credits.

actionability.retroactive_note: Action required during tax year — verify if still applicable

description: Allows the grantor to include trust-level deductions and credits directly on their own tax return as if they owned the assets personally.
